'''Joq Landhauler''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of the [[Thaereian military]] serving in the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]]. Landhauler was part of a Thaereian [[Squad/Legends|squad]] that tried to obtain the head of [[L8O-RC|L80-RC]] from [[Ginder]] the [[Bimm (furred species)/Legends|Bimm]], alongside fellow soldier [[Kirla Shorg]] under the leadership of [[Teck Randon]]. Though they wore gray [[Miner/Legends|miner's]] [[Jumpsuit/Legends|jumpsuits]] instead of uniforms, they did not try to disguise their military bearing. The trio tried to intimidate a group of freelancers who were helping Ginder into handing over the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] head, but interference from a group of criminals ended up in a battle between the three factions, with the head staying in the possession of the freelancers.
